review_text:
What a beautiful spot. Stayed in our motorhome. Nice big spots, great big kitchen, seperate ensuite. Very clean would highly recommend. I will definitely be going back again.
The owner (forgot to ask name) was so friendly and lovely to deal with. Has playground, laundry with dryers and washing machine. Even has dump point and bike repair station.
10 out 10 👍
Was the best place I stayed in Tasmania and Matt was a great host.

I stayed here for a couple of nights and found the service very friendly and well organised. The beach, cafes and access to the Bay of Fires and other scenic spots was perfect. It’s destinations like this one that makes travelling in Tassie so enjoyable.

Wow what a lovely caravan Park, lovely clean facilities, well maintained, private sites, short walk to the beach and coffee shops, bunnies, bird life, paddymelons, pets allowed, fires allowed. Our only negative we were told on arrival to go pick a camp, totally threw us , we drove around twice to make sure it was the one we wanted, 😂😂😂😂, no negatives here really enjoyed our time. Highly recommend, it's close to so many interesting places
Beautiful place, lovely beach & most spotlessly clean bathrooms of all the places we stopped at in Tasmania. I highly recommend.
Great facilities, super keen, friendly park manager
Absolutely awesome place to stay. Has everything you need. We will definitely be back for another stay

I had an amazing experience the facilities are absolutely top-notch everything is clean, well maintained and very comfortable. The bathrooms and showers are excellent always spotless and with good water pressure

The campsite itself is well organized, with plenty of space and a peaceful atmosphere, perfect for relaxing and enjoying nature.

What really stood out to me was the staff They are incredibly professional, friendly and always willing to help with anything you need.

I would definitely recommend this place to anyone looking for a high quality camping experience

Accomodating from the first phone call to book!
As we were a late check in. Our fire was lit for us to warm up the hot tub.
Tents are cosy and warm, could not fault a thing. Definitely will return.

很清靜的營地，儘管其他營地是有人住，大概他們都用內置的廚房，公用的廚房基本上都只得我在使用😅

設有很多格浴室，一定足夠使用，可惜的是沐浴出水只有5分鐘，就像軍人一樣跟時間競賽，一旦時間夠了水會自動關閉，甚至乎連浴室的燈也會自動熄滅。天氣冷的時候如果還沒洗完一定會很冷，而且浴室內的燈關掉後會漆黑一片。

希望營地可以把淋浴時間最少增加多3分鐘(8分鐘)，還有可以把浴室內的燈改成有感應器，如果有人在動就會自動開啟，否則漆黑一片客人很難步行到開關掣開燈，而且在淋浴時地面濕滑，其實有一點危險。

整體來說，營地是很乾淨漂亮，很適合度假的地方。

We had such a lovely stay at Scamander Sanctuary — honestly, one more night would have made it perfect.

It’s a great base if you’re heading out to the St Helens trails, and the beach nearby is beautiful, clean, and super easy to access. The highlight for us was definitely the hot tub and the kids’ play area in the deluxe family safari tent — such a nice touch and kept everyone happy.

Matt was fantastic throughout our stay. Really great customer service and always greeted us with a friendly smile, which makes such a difference.

Only small suggestion would be adding a little condiments caddy with basics like oil, salt and pepper — just makes cooking a bit easier.

Overall though, we’d absolutely visit again. Such a beautiful spot and a really relaxing stay!

This is my first glamping experience and I love it. This place is awesome. A few odd choices but the facilities are awesome and everything was comfortable and relaxing. The log fire is wonderful and having frequent visits from the locals is great (Pademelon). Would love to have stayed longer and definitely on our list of places to stay when we return.
Nice level sites and the cleanest camp kitchen and amenities we’ve come across.

We had a lovely peaceful stay overnight at a powered site while exploring the east coast. Staff were so friendly and accomodating. Facilities were clean and stocked for every need.

Just a 10 minute stroll to the beach, and you can hear the waves crashing at night! 😍
Excellent camping facilities - clean, lots of showers, well spread out sites and a bonus playground. The beach was a short walk away and it was a quiet base to explore Bicheno and Bay of Fires
This was a great little park. Lovely bush setting with top amenities

Whe we go to caravan parks we opt for the powered site with water. Having been in Tassie for 3 weeks already, we have experienced many caravan parks but this one is simply the best. Shower (with toilet) rooms were well laid out and clean with free hot water. Camp kitchen, reception, sites ... all above average. They even have a bike pole that has tools attached, with air. Not that I am a bike rider but plenty are. Definitely use this facility again. Thanks.

Love this place! Matt & the team do an awesome job. Facilities are great & the sauna & cold plunge (pay) are an added bonus. Beautiful Scamander Beach is an easy short walk. Camp was peaceful & fellow campers, friendly. St. Helens & Ironhouse Brewery are an easy drive. Great coffee in town. Great gravel bike riding on the dirt roads up the back in the forest & MTB trails not too far away. Nice golf course in town too. Thanks guys; we’ll definitely be back soon!

We stayed in the couples glamping tent and it was beyond amazing! The room was clean and comfortable and gave a romantic and relaxed feel. The toilet and shower was conveniently close by so even though we chose a room without an ensuite we didn’t feel we needed one. Customer service is exceptional, we will definitely be back many more times in the future! Highly recommend you will not be disappointed!

Staying at this clean and well -cared for park was a lovely experience. The glamping tent was roomy, very comfortable and had everything we needed. The hot tub was a great indulgence. The communal kitchen is so well equipped, we were able to prepare our meals quickly and easily. Will happily stay again on our next visit.

A place offers every thing you wanted!!

Service: Matt, the owner, is an amazing guy with happy face all the time! So happy to talk to him. He's also very fast response and helpful.

Room: We booked a bell tent for three days. It has heater, aircon, mircowave, pots and plates inside. And the mattress is a real mattress, not an air one. Everything in a four star hotel has in it. Just great, clean and nice cozy.

And it allowed FIRE!! We have been so much place in Tassie Feb 2026 effected by fire ban. Its sad but understandable, and here, allowed fire, big plus!

Wood fire Sauna here is so great and nice setup. Cant beat with a real fire. And Matt, he even agreed to let our ice bath session runs in a tempurture we wanted. Just great, chilled. We sauna every night, just unbelievable.

Thank you Matt, we have a good time. And this Pademelon comes our tent every morning too

What a great little hideaway!
After thinking we could come to Tassie and just wing it and get accommodations last minute turned sour my wife and I spent 2 hours ringing around
Finally found Matt at Scamanda Sanctuary
A great bloke
We booked a glamping tent as that's all we could find. Didn't have very high expectations as it's only a tent!
Were we WRONG!
When we unzipped the door to reveal a beautiful double bed and everything else you would need.
We travelled up to bay of fires and booked another glamping tent as our experience was that good only to find out it was twice the price and half the size.😮
So we quickly cancelled that one after calling Matt back and booking the same tent again!!
EXCELLENT!!!!!!!
we will be back

Booked a powered caravan site at this park. Beautiful location and pleasant walk to the beach. Bathrooms are ensuite style and well looked after and clean. Great laundry too. This park is amazing with lots of glamping options. We loved the grounds which were well planted with native plants. Lots of bird life about and plenty of rabbits.
They also have a Sauna and Cold Plunge which is available for hire. Would highly recommend this park.
Fantastic park, beautifully maintained. Lots of room between powered sites, great facilities and location. Owner was super friendly and accomodating.
超級讚的地方！服務人員態度也很好😆整體很舒適 衛浴設備非常乾淨 甚至還有廚房可以使用！晚上睡覺還可以聽著海浪聲 超級浪漫！

Stayed in a Safari Tent without the hot pool (unfortunately they were booked out - next time definitely).   The safari tent was so well equipped.   BBQ on deck with all cooking facilities inside you need.  The beds had electric blankets if needed & 2 air conditioners.   The owner / manager was super friendly & we had a pile of firewood chopped & ready to use in your own firepit.  Good spot to stay if you want to explore Bay of Fires.     It was a nice change to get out of small stuffy hotel rooms on our trip to Tassie.     Totally recommend
Very hilly like the rest of the state

Great place to base yourself for checking out a beautiful part of the world.
Matt is gives amazing responses/service.
Top of the range park, en-suite amenities, choose your own spot, in amongst the bush, lovely walk to beach and cafe. Peaceful bliss. Great deals eg stay 3 pay 2.

Can not fault this accommodation experience. The love and care put into a 7 star glamping experience on the beach and in the bush. I have stayed in many 'glamping' accommodation but this location, luxe environment, eco-awareness (the place has been built from recycled materials by the owner Matthew)
This is my 2nd time here and we plan to make it a regular getaway. Flawless. 20/10
This is our second visit and we love the easy booking and that we are not packed in too tightly. Park facilities are great with access to a beautiful beach

We had a powered tent site - camped in tents. We have done a lot of caravan parks and this one is on the expensive side.
Toilets and showers are well maintained. Camp kitchen has everything you need with seating/tables. About 15min walk to the beach. Lights can shine through your tent. Really great base for your east coast adventures.
I’ve stayed here multiple times over the years. Always happy with my stay
Fantastic place to stay. We were in the woody Junior and it was amazing, highly recommended
Thoroughly enjoyed our stay, hot tub was a winner! Staff were excellent and we couldn’t fault a thing. We are now new converts to glamping!!
What a fabulous place! The room booked was amazing. Sauna and ice bath were sensational. The only improvement would be removing that rooster close by calling out for an hour at 5am. Argh! Ha
Sleeping with the sound of crashing waves in the background, it's the best.

We stayed in the Woody glamping tent with hot tub and bathroom, cannot fault it and the staff were amazing!
Go the hot tub, nothing better than soaking and watching wallabies feeding at dusk.

The staff are so helpful and amazingly kind!!! The couples bell tent was absolutely beautiful! My partner and I had the best time thank you Scamander sanctuary holiday park for your amazing services and kind bubbly personalities!

Booked a glamping bell tent which exceeded all expectations. The location was awesome, close to town but far enough you felt like you were secluded, pretty much had the beach to ourselves. The tents are 5 star luxury , which consists of a  large bed, lounge, heater, a/c, microwave , fridge, kettle etc while outside had you own fire oven! Bathrooms, toilets and camp kitchen were all well serviced. Sauna and plunge pool was amazing!!! Matt was one of the best Hosts i have met and a really great guy, nothing was a problem and he went out of his way to make you feel at home. I didnt want to leave and would definitely stay there again.

A Slice of Tasmanian Heaven

Perched along the stunning north-east coast of Tasmania, Scamanda Sanctuary truly lives up to its name. From the moment you arrive, Matt and his team go above and beyond to ensure guests feel genuinely welcome, comfortable, and thoughtfully cared for.

The attention to detail is exceptional and shines through in all the simple but thoughtful touches — comfy beds dressed in pristine white linen, a pizza oven and outdoor kitchen, festoon lights creating a romantic after-dark glow, a sun-drenched hammock, and a wood-fired hot tub, all set within your own private yard. These details are exactly what make Scamanda Sanctuary stand out and raise the bar in the glamping world.

The sanctuary is spotlessly clean and beautifully presented, with each glamping tent offering a true sense of exclusivity, serenity, and privacy. Falling asleep to the sound of waves crashing on the beach, accompanied by the cheerful chatter of tiny birds nesting nearby, is pure magic.

A personal highlight was firing up the wood-fired hot tub each afternoon, glass of Tasmanian wine in hand, while soaking in the tranquil sounds of nature. It’s the kind of experience we’re often too busy to create — or truly appreciate — in our fast-paced lives. This place strikes the perfect balance between back-to-basics outdoor living and understated luxury.

If you’re looking for a place to switch off, recharge, and reconnect with nature — all while enjoying exceptional hospitality — do yourself a favour and book a stay at Scamanda Sanctuary.
We stayed in our campervan, so 5 stars for that, on a powered site. Clean amenities, good laundry, good overall location. Within walking distance to a pristine beach.

We loved our stay at Scamander Sanctuary Holiday Park. The glamping tent was beautiful, was well thought out and had everything you needed to be fully self sufficient. Tents were spread far enough apart that noise was not an issue. The camp ground & surrounds were neat and tidy. Owner Matt was lovely and very accommodating. Would highly recommend!

We spent a week at Sanctuary caravan park and couldn’t fault a thing. Added bonus was the coffee every morning.
The facilities are so clean and everything is there. Totally recommend the place.
Great amenities, location and service! Absolutely enjoyed our stay! The only downside is the bathroom tend to flood a-bit from the shower however we loved our stay and highly recommend.

5 star glamping experience. Very clean and tidy well appointed tent for 3 night stay. Short walk to beach, coffee shops and hotel. Rivermouth entrance provides opportunities  for swimming, fishing and surfing. Secluded area for tent with comfortable bed and warm and snug overnight. Fantastic hot tub and immaculate ensuite. Top class management very friendly and eager to ensure you enjoy your stay to the fullest. Highly recommended

We’ve stated at several caravan parks during our travels, and this one stands out for excellent standards. The biggest asset this park has is its manager. Matt was really helpful and friendly. You would not meet a nicer person. This park exceeded our expectations in every aspect 👍

Great spot, large sites for camping, modern, clean amenities, appreciate the  private combined shower/toilet rooms. We brought bikes there were lots of bike paths & walking paths to explore between the park & beach & town.

Lovely camping site with fab facilities very near the beach!
We stayed 2 nights over Christmas and have no faults!
Facilities very clean - the best toilets/showers we've had on our tasmania trip!
Mostly good, clean and modern. Marked down due to showers on timer and dusty road through which should be sealed.
Matthew was a great host and always accommodating. The glamping tents are first class and a great spot to base yourself for an East Coast adventure.

Great value for a well laid out park, large sites both powered and unpowered. Modern style shower and toilet rooms and a large well equipped camp kitchen. Pet friendly too. Bike repair station on site. Highly recommended. Only $37 for unpowered pitch for 2 + dog.
We overnighted on a powered site. Good value at $37. Functional camp kitchen. Clean ablutions. Spacious park and a quick stroll to the beach.

Great 4 nights camping in a powered site. Lovely big site, excellent, clean, well equipped camp kitchen and spotless individual bathrooms. Also front loader washer,  so gentle on your clothes. Matt was very welcoming and helpful.
Well maintained campground in great location. Wouldn’t hesitate to return.

We had a fabulous stay at the Scamander Sanctuary Holiday park. Matt has done an exceptional job with the campsite. The glamping tents are incredible, spacious and comfortable, alongside the facilities being well maintained. Overall it was a great experience and we will come back again. Highly recommend the glamping experience and the caravan park.

Staying here with friends and the place couldn’t be better. Great location, lovely facilities, and the owner/manager is really helpful. The most minor point to note is that wifi coverage is patchy in some parts of the campground but I welcome the chance to be off my phone!

What a find.
Amazing bush park, camping $31 a night p&w
Big sites, very clean and new facilities. 10 minute walk to the beach which we had all to ourselves.
Matt(?) at reception was very efficient and friendly.

Fabulous park! Matt was so helpful and welcoming, nothing was too much trouble. We were able to arrive on the day and stayed an extra night as it was such a lovely spot. Walk to the beach and to town. Very clean and well maintained amenities. Highly recommended

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Hidden away on the stunning east coast of Tasmania, Scamander Sanctuary Caravan Park is an absolute treasure! It’s the perfect family getaway peaceful, safe, and only a short walk to the beach. The facilities are exceptional: a fantastic camp kitchen, great playground, and spotless showers and toilets.

The owner truly makes this place special  he’s so welcoming, always checking in to make sure everyone’s happy. His two friendly dogs are just the icing on the cake! You can really tell how much pride and care he puts into the park.

We had such a wonderful stay and can’t wait to come back. One of the best family caravan parks in Tasmania! 🌊✨🏕️

Loved the stay. Good place close to the beach.
Only thing that I didn’t like was I could hear other vehicles outside the premises at night.

Teltta oli kaunis ja siinä oli kaikki tarvittava yöpymiseen. Kaunis ranta lähellä.
Huono puoli oli se,että keskellä yötä teltan lämmityslaite lakkasi toimimasta ja teltta viileni niin,että siellä oli lämmintä +9astetta klo 1-7 välillä. Eli oli todella epämiellyttävän kylmä nukkua! Sanoimme asiasta lähtiessämme vastaanotossa.  Omistaja kieltäytyi antamasta yhtään hyvitystä,vaikka teltan lämmityslaite lakkasi toimimasta keskellä yötä. Eli jouduimme maksamaan täyden hinnan. Onneksi Bookin.com,  josta olimme tehneet varauksen ymmärsi tilanteemme ja antoi hyvityksen omistajan kieltäydyttyä.

We stayed for a couple of nights in a 2 bedroom safari tent and had an amazing time! Our friends stayed in the house be bedroom and both were great! The park is lovely, glamping tents are super comfortable with everything you need such as crockery, heatpump/aircon, electric blankets, fluffy blankets if requiring further warmth, great enclosed firepots to sit by of a night, tv, ensuite, fridge and a few pots and pans etc. Amenities were good and the park is situated in a lovely spot. So beautiful to see different wild life and hear all the different beautiful sounding birds!! Matthew who runs the park couldn’t have been nicer to deal with on the phone and also in person - very welcoming, super helpful, friendly, nothing was a problem and always smiling! We would highly recommend and can’t wait to stay again either in the safari tents or in the seperate section for camping.
Amazing place to stay! The caretaker is very friendly and helpful. We stayed here on our honeymoon and absolutely loved it.

Pros: owner is extremely friendly and happy to help with whatever he can. The cabin / tent was extraordinarily charming. Despite the limit space, all amenities are provided, even a smart TV, heated blankets, and air conditioner. I think next time we will go for the deluxe cabins as they looked amazing from the outside. Very short and scenic walk to the beach nearby was great.

Cons: The Rooster 😭. There is a rooster insanely close by (not on the camp grounds so I doubt the owner has any control over this) that will start crowing at 4am and will never stop. This almost ruined the stay for me. If you're like me and are a light sleeper, I strongly suggest bringing a pair of soundproof headphones to tune out this obnoxious rooster. I do think the fact this rooster is so close by should be mentioned on their website as it came as a complete surprise.
This next con had nothing to do with the services provided, but we got unlucky with some inconsiderate neighbouring guests who let their children roam freely unsupervised into our tent area (the sanctuary has specific rules prohibiting this so this isn't against the sanctuary as it wasn't their fault) who seemed to enjoy hissing at us for fun. These inconsiderate neighbours also inexplicably took our parking spot instead of using their own. Once again, this is in no way a complaint to the sanctuary, but it definitely effected our stay this time.
Lastly, and this is very nitpicky so feel free to ignore; but the heated blanket units should probably be replaced as their displays are broken and make it rather difficult to figure out how to use them.

Overall an excellent stay, and we will definitely be returning when we find ourselves back in Tassie :)

Couldn’t fault anything. Complimentary upgrade to the safari tent due to bad weather and it was great. Staff were super helpful and friendly and location is always great being walking distance from the beach and shops. Will definitely stay again.

Its a very nice place exactly what we are looking for!  with clean rooms and things you needed inside and very warm bed .. When you wake up you just walk few minutes and you can see a very nice beach you can witness sunrise! Left my ipad and staff is very kind to post it! Definetely a place to stop if your traveling tasmania!
Highly recommend

We have been traveling around Tassie for 3 years and Scamander Sanctuary is by far the best campground in the state. The amenities are first class the sites spacious and Matt is an excellent host. You want a great spot to spend some time... come to Scamander Sanctuary. John and Robyn Guy

I spent a night at Scamander Sanctuary Holiday Park in the Woody Jnr tent and was honestly blown away by it.

To start, Matt was incredibly kind and helpful and made me feel welcome from the get go. The tent and set up where an absolute dream, with every little detail thought of - even enough power points which is a rarity in most hotels, let alone a tent!
The hot tub was utterly luxurious, the bed beyond comfortable and the peace and quiet of the area unmatched.

For anyone who wants the touch of luxury in the outdoors you can't go past here. I'll be recommending this to everyone I know and will definitely be returning.
Fabulous bush sauna and ice bath omg so so nice
The people and the park itself are nice, but the showers up the back are terrible.
Awesome caravan park. Close to beach and shops. Brand new camp kitchen and ensuite block. Great hosts/owner.
Nice people with best and best friendly. Im Steven by the way. Thanks alot for your hospitality guys. We really appreciate it. This motel, hotel, inn or camp whatever.  We love it.

Had a lovely stay in the couples safari tent for our anaversary, weather was not great but the amazing staff gave us an upgrade so we didn't have to walk to bathrooms in the rain completely outshined that bad weather and rain. lovely area, easy to navigate. The rooms were neat and well kept overall was amazing and will definatly be staying again.

We headed up to scamander beach resort for dinner one night staff were lovely and food was great definatly recommend the pizza.

Purchased 3 nights in a clamping tent for $350  from Travel Auctions, unfortunately due to ill health was unable to redeem these nights. Un be known there was a 12 month status on this purchase management would not help out because we were 6 months outside this time he was very happy to keep our money through no cost to him.
Make sure you do every thing by the rules as I could never recommend this business.

Wow.  What an amazing place to stay.  We would have to rate this as one of the very best accommodation places in Tasmania!!!
We will be back 😃

We had a very relaxing 5 night Autumn stay here.  It was very peaceful and not many others around.  Really nice en-suite style amenities, great stocked camp kitchen and electric BBQs outside but still under cover.  Fuel, pharmacy, post office and groceries close by plus cafes.  About 15 minutes drive to St Helens for more shopping

Excellent facilities and location.We stayed at the Woody Jr. And would recomend it 100%. Hot tub is amazing and the kitchen has all you need to enjoy a great glamping experience. Matt provided us an outstanding friendly service, even stepping out of his way to heat up the hot tub before our arrival.
Clean, everything worked well, beautiful location next to the beach. Was easy to get to. Extremely helpful and friendly staff. Overall Excellent. Highest Rating!

Travelling around Tasmania in our motorhome and came across this gem of a park.
Great off season prices.
Amenities fabulous and clean.
Mathew (owner) is helpful and available if needed.
Easy walk to beach and local cafe.
Highly recommend  👌 💙🧡🐾
Partner and I stayed in the couples bell tent and we loved it! Very peaceful and relaxing would definitely stay again

Great setup glamping safari tent highly recomend. Beautiful area short wallk to the beach. Very friendly staff and very clean with everything you need for a great indoor outdoor experience 😀 kimmyrussadventures

We stayed at Scamander Sanctuary with our 2 year old daughter and had the most wonderful time! We stayed in one of the luxury self contained tents and it was the perfect getaway. Only a short walk to the beach and in a great little beachside community. The owner Matt was so welcoming and helpful. We loved our time in Scamander and will definitely return!
Amazing, will be coming more often,

Unbelievable place to stay!
The wood fired pizza oven and spa are amazing.
I would just say that the area maybe needs a gate across the entrance to stop people from wandering in on you and to give a little more privacy.
Would definitely stay again

Thanks for the great service Matt! ☺️
Used a powered camper van site.

Scamander sanctuary is a perfect place to switch off and relax. In a wonderful, quiet location, you wake to the sounds of birds and not cars!! Stunning beach on the doorstep but close enough to visit Bicheno, St Helens and Bay of fires.
Great setup and amenities. The onsite toilet and shower blocks are a good feature. The short walk along the beach into the town is nice too.

We loved our stay in the caravan section at this fabulous holiday park. Bathrooms were spotless and modern. Very quiet location.
Matt is a great host who would go out of his way to ensure your stay was enjoyable.
Highly recommend. One of the best spots we’ve stayed at in our 5 weeks in Tassie.

Stayed on a caravan site with power and water. Found our stay here to be very enjoyable within easy reach to many places. 7 night deal at $220 was a bonus. Would recommend and would certainly come back again

What a fantastic Glamping Experience amongst the trees, birds, wallabies, pademelons and sand dunes! Stayed in a Family Glamping tent with a brand new Heated Spa out front. Stoking the fire and heating water is fun. Matt the owner goes above and beyond to ensure everyone enjoys their stay and loves hearing about your stay. Going back sure am! Going to book well ahead to make sure we get in. Thanks again Matt. R&R.

In our experience the best caravan park in Tasmania. Full ensuite style toilet / showers in the amenities block. Great level grounds with a variety of sites available. Pick your own site. If only all caravan parks could be this good.
What a pleasant place to stay at. The toilets and showers are impeccably clean.  There was nothing to complain about. Good sized sites for Caravans and all well maintained amenities.
Perfect in every way!

Stayed two nights at an unpowered site. Great rates compared to places in other areas. Amenities were clean, kitchen had everything you'd need for cooking (fridge, oven, stove tops), also bbq facilities.
Toilets/showers were clean and private (all separate rather than the standard communal bathrooms in most caravan parks)

I booked it online , it was easy and hassle free. We arrived late due to something coming up at the last minute. We were welcomed by Matt even after hours which we really appreciate. Matt got the hot water tub ready for us and even kept an eye on the fire when we went out for dinner. Matt went far beyond his duties to provide satisfaction to us. He was a good man to have a chat with it. The place was very nice, close to the beach and eatery.  They do have parking spaces as well. I forgot to click pictures of the place as I was enchanted by the looks of it. Every picture I clicked has us in the picture. Overall the place is worth the money.
Stayed for 5 nights. Sraff are very friendly and helpful. Great location, close to St Helens and Bicheno. Amenities are impeccable. Highly recommended.

Great caravan park, generous sized sites. The man behind the desk was very relaxed and friendly, you also get to pick any free spot you’d like when you arrive there. Walking distance to beach access and tracks & a good playground for the kids.
Had such an amazing stay at Scamander Sanctuary. The Bell Tent was so cute and well equipped with everything we needed. Kitchen and bathroom facilities were spotless!
Very cosy safari tents everything you need and want. Quite peaceful place. Beach close by. Matt is a very pleasant manager and helpful. We will be back again.
This place is amazing.  Glancing tents set up is great.  Facilities are clean and tidy.  Helpful staff.  If you are in TAS put this place on your accommodation list I’d rate it 10/19
Very quiet location. Very clean ensuites. Unfortunately no hand soap. Showers on a 5 minute timer which was plenty.
Great caravan park, lovely owners, big sites....great camp kitchen with 3 ovens! What a treat!! .....fantastic ensuite style amenities  and great BBQ area. Highly recommend
Lovely ammenities.  Clean big showers/ bathrooms. Nice to pick own site. Quiet setting

We experienced the Deluxe Glamping with hot tub for 4 glorious nights. With wildlife at our doorstep & short walk to beach & township of Scmander, this place was perfect for our getaway. The host, Matt, was so helpful & no request was too much trouble. Great cooking facilities & lovely deck to enjoy alfresco meals. Spent way too much time in the wood heated luxury hot tub!
Highly recommend staying here on your next East Coast holiday.

Far exceeded my expectations. Upon arrival we were greeted with a smile, promptly checked in and went to our family glamping tent with hot-tub.
Wow! Just wow! The set up of this little tent was sensational. Air conditioned, Full kitchen, bathroom and 2 seperate bedrooms sleeping 6 in total. The kids absolutely loved the little cubby kids playroom and secret bed above. With beach access right at our doorstep and a hot tub heated by a wood-fire that doubled up as a s'more cooker, we had no reason to leave this beautiful place. Was made even more perfect but the beautiful rain storm we got on the 1st night. Cant pass up the sound of rain on a canvas tent!

Such a pleasure to meet the proprietor - nothing is too much trouble, friendly, helpful and you can pick your own site. Near new amenities with toilet, shower hand basin in each cubicle. Great park to base yourself as very reasonably priced with G'day parks discount as well. Only 15 mins to St Helens. Ocean across the road follow the track to the beach. Gorgeous safe swimming at Scamander itself. Highly recommend.

Unexpected gem ! We booked at the last minute into a glamping bell tent and have been blown away with how great it is here !|The tents themselves are 5 star luxury , even a lounge is included . Outside there is a secluded deck with a potbelly fire and deck chairs , perfect for a glass of wine whilst listening to the beach in the background . Oh yes , an amazing beach is only a few minutes walk away!|Amenities are spotless and we were so impressed with the inclusion of a cheese knife and wine glasses as well as shampoo etc .

Hello Smiley, we really enjoyed our stay, we were only disappointed that we didn't find you earlier, & could have stayed longer.
You have created a wonderful experience very sexual & romantic, even for an old fart like me.
We have never glamped before, so we can't compare your park with others, but we will  definately go glamping again.
The facilities are great, the camp kitchen was second to none, & your site being very private with the fences all around was exceptional.
Our site no. 8. was one of your best.
Congratulations young man, you have created a wonderful space.
Regards, Roger Morris

Really great glamping in high quality , very comfortable and well equipped tents with great facilities and a very attentive and helpful on site owner . Pretty quiet even though by the road - well placed for exploring bay of fires . Limited range of nearby food shops

Prime location, ultra comfortable and fun set up inside the deluxe safari tent, friendly staff and of course the wood fired hot tub was an amazing way to end the day (we contacted them directly to upgrade to the tent with hot tub)!

Great location close by to beaches and surf breaks. The glamping tent we stayed in was beautiful and private would definitely recommend going for a weekend break, the owner Matt was super lovely! Great stay!
Great spot and Matt was an awesome host. Great camp kitchen and 5 minute walk to the beach.
Amazing caravan park. Lots of room for the unpowered sites. The toilet and showers were private which was a nice treat. Matt at the front desk was super helpful
Best campsite i’ve ever stayed at. Bathrooms and amenities were so clean and well kept, and the site was beautiful. Would definitely come back!
Great park to stay very friendly and helpful staff, we had a caravan site they were big and clean . Beautiful bush setting , clean self contained toilets. Would stay again loved the place Thank You.

Scamander sanctuary holiday park is the perfect place to relax. Fantastic glamping accommodation or bring your caravan tent swag or van for the perfect bush setting. Amenities are immaculate and staff friendly and nothing to much for them to help you with. We will be spending a lot more time at this park .
Deb John and family
Well deserved 5 star rating 👏 👍

Fabulous stay here - glamping tent was beautiful with comfy bed and everything we needed. Showers and toilets were exceptionally clean and lovely to use. Perfectly located to visit the Bay of Fires. Owners were also very friendly

We stayed in a couple’s bell tent. The entire complex was clean, tidy and well organised. We loved the location as it is within walking distance to the beach. This is a real gem! It a shame we couldn’t stay longer.

Pleasant park. Nice walk to the beach. Liked the ensuite type facilities. The showers were hot and plentiful even though on timers.
Would recommend this park.
Amazing caravan park

We stayed in a 2 bedroom tent and had a really fun glamping experience. The site is about a 5-10 mins walk to the beach and is well maintained. In the evenings, we spotted wallabies and rabbits just outside our tent. Tent layout is well considered and accommodates families (which is rare). All the included toiletries are Australian made and ethical. The host (Matt) was super friendly and very organised so we felt well looked after. We wouldn't hesitate to recommend to other families for a fun camping experience without all the fuss.

We had the most beautiful 2 night stay!
Immaculate glamping site, central location for Bay of Fires Area and Freycinet and amazing service (Mathew is a superstar).
Well managed, clean with good facilities. Close to the beach, nice flat wide sites with good planting screens between most sites.
We stayed at the caravan site and were happy with our stay! Very nice area, fresh toilets and showers and a short walk to the beach. Lovely lady working in the reception.

Easy check in and a fantastic glamping tent. The staff who welcomed us were nothing short of awesome. All facilities maintained in great condition. You can tell they take pride in what they are delivering. Our first glamping experience and the bar is set extremely high. Highly recommend and we will be back.
Highly recommend this place. Friendly service, big caravan spots in nature, a lovely short stroll to the beach and clean private bathrooms. Close to St Helens and surrounding attractions.

The glamping tents were more luxurious than we could have hoped for! We were only staying one night but I wish we could have stayed longer. The bed was really comfy and the facilities were spot on. We weren’t aware about the beach access road but it was so lovely being able to walk from our tent straight down to the beach for sunrise! Matt was so friendly and lovely.
Excellent place and people really friendly and helpful 🫶

Glamping Review: 8/10

My experience with glamping was overall very positive! The location was stunning, surrounded by nature but with all the comforts of home. The tent or cabin was spacious, clean, and well-equipped, providing a great balance between the outdoors and luxury. I especially appreciated the comfortable bed and the cozy amenities like lighting, and even a small kitchenette.

The staff were super friendly and attentive, ensuring everything was set up perfectly for my stay.

Our first glamping experience was nothing short of amazing with Scamander Sanctuary holiday Park - the Bell tent was cosy, romantic, clean. Beds were comfortable and we had just the right amenities provided. Communal toilet, shower and cooking space which were clean and well maintained. Matt, the owner was exceptional to deal with, accomodating booking date changes and attending to any of our requests promptly. Could not recommend more !
Such a beautiful place to stay 😍
Excellent place to stay.

We stayed on a powered site in our van. The caravan park has the cleanest amenities I’ve seen at any caravan park.
Matt was very friendly & welcoming.
Considering how busy it was, it was still a quiet and relaxing stay.
We can’t wait to visit again.
Such an amazing stay. Clean facilities and great atmosphere with only a short walk to the beach to catch some fish for dinner. Thanks for having us Matt!
Great place to chill in comfort but feel like a “camper”! 10/10
Loved our stay. the manager was really helpful, beautiful tents, amazing views and very clean. really recommend this place.
Very well maintained park. Large caravan sites. Spotless amenities. Camp kitchen has all the mod cons. Best position with lovely walkthrough to beach. 10/10.

Matt was very polite and welcoming,the couples  bell tents are a beautiful and relaxing place to stay for any occasion . Coffee shop less than 5 mins down the road with beautiful breakfast,beach within walk distance, the kitchen,showers and toilets are all a great addition also. Would definitely stay again!
The glam tent was comfortable and every convenience was included. This is luxury but affordable camping

We’ve had the pleasure of staying here twice—once as a couple and once with family—and each time has been incredible. Matt goes above and beyond to ensure every detail is taken care of, making your stay seamless and enjoyable. The facilities are spotless, the tents have everything you need, and the beach is within walking distance! Whether you are after a romantic getaway or a family adventure, this spot is perfect! We can’t wait to come back!

Sleeping under canvas has never been so good.
The tent is well equipped and the bed comfie.
Unfortunately it rained most of the 6 nights we stayed however we were warm and dry at all times.
The sound of the waves lulled is to sleep at night and the various bird calls woke us with a smile each morning.
Scamander Sanctuary is well situated for touring around the North East of Tasmania.
The main shops are in St Helen's just a short scenic drive up the road.
I would highly recommend glamping at Scamander Sanctuary.

Was one the best birthday suprises! Would 1000% recommend this place if your after somewhere quiet and relaxing this is the place to go!
The owner(I think) who runs the park is so lovely! Made sure we were stocked with fire, the essentials. Definitely will be back such an amazing place 👌
Lovely stay. Next to beach, clean and tidy. Place is well looked after by Matt & team. Will book again 👍🏽

Excellent glamping tents with lots of little touches that were lovely. Excellent communal kitchen area and bathroom facilities. Very Short walk to the beach from the tent to a stunning beach. Amazing service and friendly staff. We will be back!!

We stayed in the couples bell tent, super cute, comfortable, spacious, and warm! our check in couldnt have been smoother! Very clean and lovely accommodation respectful and quiet, the owner Matt is the kindest guy you'll ever meet, goes above and beyond to make you feel comfortable and at ease, answered every question we had with a smile! He works hard to make sure his guests are looked after and the grounds are clean, super lovely stay, great job on privacy and awesome little fire pots/ outdoor seating area, the rooms have great ventilation and even heating/ air con. There's beach access, and the owner even let us use his paddle boards. It's an awesome place for your next stay. We will definitely be back! 😊
Quiet spot and the amenities were super clean and in good condition. Great service too

We  stayed 7 nights in or caravan and neither of us can fault this Park. Peaceful, tidy and amenities were very clean and private.  The owner was very  easy going but was always professional and passionate about his business.  Scamander sanctuary holiday park is going to be used often by us.
Really perfect setup, super friendly staff, great value for money

Gorgeous place to stay. We arrived after hours but Matt was extremely friendly and helpful, making out of hours check in a breeze. The communication is excellent and the glamping tents are an absolute vibe - clean, tidy and have everything you need!
Loved the fairy lights on the deck! Good shower temp and pressure, plus efficiencies like bed lamp switches on the bed frame made winding down at night easier. You also get electric blankets and heating (ya need it)! The tents are also carefully placed so you have privacy from other guests.
Only downside to our stay was the tent next door - they were loud after 10pm.
Location was ideal and the accommodation was amazing!  Host was very helpful and friendly

Staying in the DELUXE SAFARI WITH HOT TUB/ PLUNGE POOL was the best ever we had two nights away there ,over the weekend, Matt the owner was so helpful getting the hot tub ready and warm when we arrived, we will definitely be back to stay there again. Good work on running the park Matt top job!!
Cheers,
Dave

We stayed in the Woody Junior tent, and 10/10 can't recommend it enough!! The hot tub takes a good three hours to get really hot, but it's enjoyable from the two hour mark. We had pademelons hopping through our camp while we were in the tub, and it was absolutely beautiful. The location is great, halfway between wineglass bay and the bay of fires. The man who checked us in was wonderful, so bubbly and welcoming. The beach is a short walk away down a sandy path (5-10 minutes) for the sunset/sunrise. If you're in the area, seriously consider booking the Woody Junior.

If you want to support a young guy going in head first to make something of himself, then choose here. It's a one man show here and from the moment I walked through the door of reception I was greeted with a big hello and smile.
I knew I was at a good place then.
I camped in my Van here, but having access to the toilets and hot showers were amazing, they were genuinely one of the cleanest shower blocks I've seen in my travels.
You can have fires here in a fire Pot, I didn't have a pot but old mate went out of his way and found one for me over the course of the afternoon.
They also sell firewood here on site too if you run low or have none.
There is also BBQ facilities and tables around the grounds too.
$20 a night (at the time of posting) I found was very cheap with all the facilities offered. I'd without a doubt pay more knowing how good it is and the service.

All in all I definitely recommend this place, and when I come back along the east coast I'll be back.

We have stayed here a number of times. This place is perfect for anyone, all are welcome.
Bathrooms are clean, accommodation is clean. The basic items are included for a glamping experience. The place is looking great.
Regards Russ and Krista

We cannot rate Matt the Owner of Scamanda Sanctuary Holiday Park highly enough. Matt goes above and beyond . Amenities are clean and Park is beautifully kept. We have already booked our next trip back as it is our favourite Holiday Park.

We stayed here for one night in the  safari tent and we loved it. Very clean, comfy bed, great facilities, shower pressure great. It was a bit cold but the heat pump soon warmed us up. I bought my own hair dryer as one isn't supplied. Beautiful beach nearby, we are looking forward to coming back, we will hopefully get the one with the hot tub next time. First time glamping and such an awesome experience.
Gut organisiert mit sehr freundlichem Personal

I'm still getting used to holidaying on my own and the owner or manager of this place was so welcoming and full of knowledge regarding the best places to visit. The glamping tents are super private and clean and all amenities are top notch! Well done guys, you've out done yourself 💚

After hours check in was very easy to follow and facilities within the park were awesome. Individual toilet and shower cubicles are amazing! Well maintained. Laundry was easy to use. We dealt with Matt during our time here and he was very friendly, responsive, professional and had a couple of cute dogs! Only downside we had to search around a bit to find a level site but there were many to choose from!
Clean and cosy, very relaxing and just a quick walk to the beach or cafe for an ice cream!

What a magical experience. This was our first time glamping and certainly won’t be the last. Incredible!! The owner (Matthew?) is an absolute legend and his service is first class. Highly recommend this place to anyone wanting to give glamping a go. Cheers, Alex and Kylie

Best experience. The owner is so lovely and goes above and beyond. We're on our honeymoon and he printed off the loveliest welcome sign. ❤️ Best sleep, it's got it all, electric blankets, comfortable bed, heater and TV.
Absolutely awesome camp sites! Plenty of space for camper, awning and car! Amenities were top notch. Good access to beach and into town, reasonable price! Extremely happy!!

We really enjoyed our time at Scamander. Matt clearly takes his responsibility in caring for the park very seriously. It is beautifully maintained and cared for. We were blessed with lots of birds and wildlife at dusk. Great location to the beach and all we discovered on the east coast. Extra blankets, excellent hot water and shower, electric blankets and heating were great and needed for our stay. Thoughtfull additions include the split system remote attached to the bed and being able to unpack the car onto the deck that surrounds the tent. This saves you dragging your luggage far from the car or up and down steps. Believe me it's these small things that make your stay more relaxing.  We highly recommend this experience, if you're going to Glamp do it at Scamander Sanctuary Park! Thanks Matt for having us.

We went as family of 4. The staff were very friendly and the place was very well equipped. Beautifully located, less than 5 minutes walk to the beach. Highly recommended the breakfast deal that can be purchased at additional cost.

Wether your looking for Glamping or Camping this place has it.
I only needed Camping so didn't really need much just an unpowered site well....
I didn't expect to see the ensuites they had setup there that was just luxury.
Very happy with my stay last night will definitely bring the 4wd club and stay while checking out Scamander. Thanks again Legends.

I recently stayed at Scamander Sanctuary Holiday Park and wanted to share my experience. The service was excellent—The owner so friendly and accommodating throughout my stay. The room was clean and well-maintained, Amenities were as advertised, with reliable Wi-Fi and a good breakfast. The bed was comfortable, and the location was convenient for my needs. Overall, I felt it was a good value for the price.

perfect location! Matt is really nice:) although winter winds blow like monster at night, but the tent pretty solid so we didn't blow away.
totally clean fully equipped kitchen, really comfy bathroom.
definitely recommend💛 for those who wants to have impressive beach just around the corner of ur tent👍🏻👍🏻

Beautiful beaches and great base to travel to bay of fires and blue tier national park. Our Glamping tent was spacious and warm with everything our family needed to cook and relax. The friendly owner and staff helped us with everything we needed.
We booked a couple's Safari tent for the night, the tent was beautiful as was the location and only a short walk to the beach. Matt was a very friendly and helpful host, we will definitely be back 😀

Our second time staying here because it’s absolutely fantastic. Excellent service, all the arrival info you need plus plenty of extras.

And the glamping tents! So comfortable, cute, all the amenities (including good coffee!), a bed that you could stay in for ages, and it stayed nice and warm even with some pretty intense wind blowing outside.

Matt (owner) came by after we’d settled in just to check if we needed anything, which is excellent customer service and goes to show there is heart behind everything that’s done here.

The outside fireplace which is the perfect place to kick back with a drink and snacks and watch the stars while listening to the ocean. We even saw a bandicoot scooting around, looking for food.

We will stay for longer than one night on our next visit to Tassie’s east coast. Honestly, it’s even better than in the photos 👍🏼

Husband and I went Glamping here and had the best time. Spewing we were only there for one night. Such a beautiful place, with a short walk to the beach and the local cafes. The service was excellent, very friendly gentleman running the show. The rooms were so cosy and clean and were able to keep warm in the winter weather. This is a lovely place that I would be glad to return to and for longer next time! The shared bathrooms were clean and modern.

Such an amazing place, great location, the glamping tent’s amazing, equipped with a heat pump and electric blanket so it’s super toasty. Got some free firewood as well. 10/10, will definitely be back for sure!!! The staff was very friendly too!

Had an amazing stay at Scamander Sanctuary Holiday Park. The glamping tent was spotless and cozy, with all the essentials for a comfortable stay. The location is stunning, nestled in nature with easy access to the beach. The staff were welcoming, and the peaceful surroundings made it a perfect escape. Highly recommend for anyone looking for a relaxing glamping experience ☺️

Booked the Safari tent for one night and it came with wood for the fire place (special that was on) The safari tent was very clean and was provided with everything you need. The bed was comfortable, heater worked well, TV, great hot water and pressure.

I was impressed with how much fire wood we received and good supply of coffee, tea, shampoo, conditioner, soap. Etc Towels were nice.

Close to walk to the beach and it was wonderful to hear the ocean at night time.

An Amazing experience we got to use the outside tub that is heated by a fire under the stars.

The park itself was clean and beautiful.

Had the opportunity to meet the owner when we checked in. He was very friendly and helpful. You can tell he cares about the place and his customers.

I highly recommend staying here and the next time in TAS I will be staying again

Thanks for a wonderful stay 😊

We had a powered RV site. The campsite has clean toilets and hot showers, a couple of camp kitchens and BBQs plus a kids playground. There’s also glamping tents and cabins for hire. The site has beach access a 5 min walk away.
Absolutely fantastic stay, the staff we encountered were so friendly, the glamping tent was amazing I wish it was closer to home so we could go back more it was a wonderful experience.
Everything you need for a cozy coastal getaway! Super welcoming and relaxed atmosphere and the fire was great for the winter nights.

我們入住了一間很漂美的房間，接待人員非常友善有禮貌。
廚房設備齊全，房間內有暖氣供應，我們在這裡渡過了難忘的週年紀念:)
很推薦👍🏻
We can’t comment on the rooms as we have a pop top caravan . But our second visit was just a good as our first . Ablutions are fresh and clean . The park is clean and welcoming .
We arrived late and hadn’t booked but this was not a problem, management helped us out over the phone. Beautiful park with lovely modern and clean facilities. Definitely would stay again.

Top spot with such great service! Will definitely be going to stay again. Stayed in one of the bell tents, very clean with a great vibe. Matt is a top bloke and sorted us out even after we rocked up for a late check in! Definitely recommend!!!!!!

A weekend away on a sheltered powered site with the sound of the ocean to rock you to sleep was great.  Natural campground surroundings, spot on facilities, ease of access and warm welcome from the owner makes for a good stay
We had a lovely stay at the three bedroom safari tent. It was a convenient, cosy and relaxing stay for our group. Looking forward to return here again. Beach was also near the location.

Great place very clean and tidy the service is amazing and they are very welcoming and go above and beyond to make your stay the best would recommend this place for sure we will definitely be back and if anyone is down that way make it your place to stay

Great park all round. Parked my caravan there for 2 nights and it was great. Very chilled out, van sites are really generous in size and lined by tress and shrubs. Felt like I was almost in a bush camp. Amenities were very good and clean. Service form the staff also top notch! Highly recommended

One of the best camping grounds in Tasmania.  Obviously planned to meet campers needs with excellent toilet & shower facilities in separate ensuite style cabins.  Hot showers timed for 5 minutes (plenty of time) large sites, a fully equipped camp kitchen and fire pits provided if you buy the wood for them. Couldn't recommend this place more highly with its location near a beautiful sandy beach and plenty of other tourist attractions.  Well done Matthew for ticking all the boxes.

Had a great time. Location is walking distance to the surf. Camp kitchen had everything you could possibly need. Showers are great. Matt provides a friendly service with enthusiasm and the park reflects this. Do yourself a favour stop by and refresh.
Always a lovely stay. Excellent location to explore up and down the East Coast.

Superb! this was amazing in every way!
memories of camping with comfort. love love love the super comfortable bed. communication top notch.

Scamander Sanctuary Holiday Park was an absolutely amazing experience. My partner (M28) and I (F25) stayed one night in the Glamping Tent. I am a big fan of camping, but wanted to introduce my partner to camping for the first time; as such, we settled on glamping.

The tent itself was absolutely gorgeous and ridiculously spacious. There was enough room for a large bed; a couch; a hanging stand; an aircon; a cupboard with a fridge, microwave, coffee machine, kitchen essentials, and a TV; a table and chair set for two; and a bin. It was so comfy and glamorous.

One thing about camping that I HATE is the bathroom situation; I worry about cleanliness and creepy crawlies while trying to go to the bathroom or shower. The bathrooms here are AWESOME and made the stay so much more comfortable and home-like.

We checked in during operating hours; but checked out early. The process for both is very easy with a lockbox outside the reception, and pretty comms through the company itself prior to your stay.

From our experience, the location is a bit far from restaurants and activities - par the beach - but that is Scamander. The closest is St Helens which has all you can need for a short 15 min drive. We parked right outside our tent too, for those coming with a car.

Our only problem is that we didn't stay long enough! Next time will definitely be more than one night!

2024年3月に一歳四ヶ月の男の子を連れて宿泊しました。

あいにく風の強い曇り空の日だったので少し寒かったですが、中はエアコン付きで快適に眠ることが出来ました。

バーベキュー設備の他にも鍋やフライパン、それを使うコンロ、電子レンジに電気ケトルなど一通り揃っていて料理が出来たのが良かったです。

この街には小さなIGAがひとつしかなさそうだったので、もし、事前に用意が出来れば買い物をしてきた方がいいかもしれません。

夜は間近にワラビーが現れて、とっても興奮しました！（消灯後は食べ物を探しにバルコニーまであがってきて、少し怖い😅）

朝、散歩をしていると野うさぎをたくさん見ることが出来ました。

息子も楽しめた宿でした！

【よかったところ】
・自然豊かな立地。
・料理に必要な道具は全て揃っている。
・家族でプライベートな時間が過ごせる。
【もう少し！】
・設備は掲載写真よりは古くなっている
・ビーチまでは少し距離がある（10分くらい）

Good base to visit the Bay of Fires , etc without the expense. Excellent new clean facilities. Owner was very friendly and helpful. We had elect problems with our van, Matt organised an electrical within half hour. Go grateful. Definitely will return

Stayed 5 nights at this wonderful campgrou d...the amenities were always kept spotlessly.clean & Matt was so helpful & friendly. Would definitely stay here again when we're around this area as it so close to St Helens & Bay of Fires.

Die Zelte werden mit Blick in's Grüne angepriesen. Wir sahen aber einfach eine Holzwand und waren direkt am Eingang, so gab es links und rechts Verkehr und lärm. Auf die Frage ob allenfalls ein anderes Zelt frei sei, bekamen wir die antwort nein sie seien ausgebucht. Die beiden Nächte die wir hier waren waren jedoch Zelte offensichtlich nicht besetzt. Das heisst man war schlicht zu faul sich zu bemühen. Im Zimmer fehlte ein Teil der Kaffemaschine und die Kapsel der letzten Gäste war auch noch drin. Es gab 2 Shampoo + Conditioner für 2 Nächte und 2 Personen. Der Bettüberwurf ist ziemlich schmudelig und riecht etwas streng.
Die Zelte waren sicher mal top, aber leider kann man zum Beispiel die Fenster nicht mehr hochrollen oder auch unten fixieren. Bei Wind ist es damit klapperig.
Die Nachbarn haben sich am zweiten Abend nicht an die Nachtruhe gehalten und sind eben mehrfach mit dem Auto rumgefahren....
Es gäbe eine bessere Bewertung, wenn die Lage des Zeltes gestimmt hätte.

Auf der Homepage wird das so angeboten:
Our Safari Tents at Scamander Sanctuary offer a tranquil escape, situated in close proximity to Scamander Beach and embraced by the serene beauty of nature, creating the perfect environment for relaxation.

Aber eben es war weder Still noch mit Blick auf die Schönheit der Natur. Da hilft alles beschwichtigen nichts.
Lovely place never been glamping before it was awesome will definitely go back
What a great place to stay in.Gotta have the most laid back people running the park, would highly recommend it as a place to use as a base and tour surrounding area

This would have to be the best park we have stayed in during our two week trip around the east side of Tasmania.
Very friendly and helpful staff, close proximity to the beach, clean, tidy and well kept grounds and there were plenty of well kept and very clean amenities throughout the park.
We were in a motor home but I would have loved to have stayed in one of the glamping tents.
Great park 10/10
We booked a night in the tent and didn't wanna leave again. Very comfortable with everything you need and attentive friendly staff!

Wow, you will definitely get more value than what you pay for when staying here.

I'm solo travelling & free camp mostly.  But l decided to book here due to the great reviews on Wikicamps.  I stayed 3n (midweek special pay for 2, stay for 3) in my c'van.

I was so surprised to find that this place offers Glamping tent accommodation on one side of the road and a caravan park on the other.
The C'van Park has super clean private ensuites & park facilities, is secure, has x-large camp sites, and is dog friendly.  Easy walk to the beach or to town.
The onsite managers are to be commended on being such hard-working, friendly people.
I highly recommended this accommodation whilst in Scamander!

We arrived at 6:00 p.m. after a long drive from Hobart stopping many times on the way to look at the east coast beauty. We were greeted by Matthew the owner who was very friendly and generous with his time. We hadn't booked ahead and it was no trouble for him to get a glamping tent ready for us. The accommodation was very clean and tidy and had everything we needed we had a wonderful stay and we'll definitely be back. Matthew was an amazing host and is doing everything right to make you feel very welcome

The Scamander Sanctuary  Holiday Park is among the best we have known and stayed at. So much so, we revisit each year and will continue to do so.  Love it so much that 2 weeks usually turns into several weeks. Meticulous facilities, beautifully maintained park, abundant wildlife, private access to a magnificent beach.  And the owner (Matt)  is the perfect host , very approachable and accommodating. |Have stayed in the safari clamping tent and also in our caravan in the park. Thank you Matt for everything that you do that makes this place so special.
Great campsite, very clean facilities. I love the individual private bathrooms! Everything you need in one place. Lovely relaxed vibe! Close to the beach, coffee shop & pub. Would highly recommend!
Nice caravan park with clean amenities and friendly owner.

The Glamping Tents are amazing and tidy and well set out. The bedding is very comfortable. The amenities are above and beyond clean! Matt the owner and host goes above and beyond. I highly recommend this place for anytime of year as each of the Glamping tents can be climate controlled.
Awesome experience in the 1 bedroom glamping tent, stayed 3 nights. Everything you is there. Nice beach. Well kept grounds. Friendly staff. Definitely recommend.

To all those average caravan parks out there, take note as to what a fabulous caravan park this is. Amazing amenities, super sized sites and very well maintained grounds and staff that make you feel welcome. 10 points and thank you Scamander Sanctury.

What a fabulous campground. Matt was extremely friendly and helpful on greeting us and during his regular site checks throughout our stay. Amenities are top notch, toilet/showers are an ensuite design and very spacious and cleaned on a daily basis. Camp kitchen was well equiped and well maintained, and again cleaned each day which is great to see. We had a great few days here with the camper trailer exploring the east coast.

Beautifully kept park with flat campsites and top amenities. I particularly liked the fully fitted out camp kitchen and combined toilet/shower blocks. The owner does a fabulous job maintaining everything!
A fantastic place! We loved the glamping tent and all the facilities it offered - only qualm was the double bed was pretty hard but that’s being picky. All was great
Good sites.  Ensuite Amenities are great

Had an amazing weekend at the park stayed in the safari tents was everything you could ask for host was so friendly and accommodating 2 nights where not enough will definitely be back we where a family of 17 all side  by side grandkids had a absolutely amazing time cannot recommend enough if you haven’t been there it’s a must 😊

Nice flat sites, good size, we fit a pop top caravan and 4 man tent no worries, amenities are fabulous. Town itself is very small, best to do food shopping before coming here. Great cafe on a water though for a yummy breaky and coffee.

Very friendly hosts running the park. The 3 bedroom Glamping tents are AMAZING! They have thought of everything, shower, toilet, all the facilities you could ever want, including coffee machine. Quick walk through the dunes to the beach. HIGHLY RECOMMEND staying here.
Great experience in a clamping tent. Very good, clean facilities. Great value for money. Fabulous location. Amazing, quiet, pristine beach.
Fun glamping experience. Loads of room. Electric blanket comfort. Luxury feel combined with the fun of camping in nature with starry sky and crackling fire
We stopped to camp there for a few nights. Was a fantastic stay , very clean neat facilities and the host Matthew was very helpful and friendly.
Twee dagen geglampd. Leuk maar lang genoeg. Miste eigen toilet en douche.
Great location, friendly helpful staff, camo grounds were in excellent condition, along with the amenities provided. Thank you for a wonderful relaxing stay, we will be back.

Fantastic Facilities. Super clean and private bathrooms - shower and toilet.
Would absolutely stay again. Cute little town, great beaches.

This was one of the best caravan parks we’ve been to. Upon arriving the holiday park looked very well managed and clean. The amenities are very well taken care of and clean and it’s very nice having a beach access. Every time I was walking around I noticed matt taken care of everything and going all out to make the place great. Wonderful park and will definitely be coming back

We absolutely loved staying at Scamander holiday sanctuary park. Matt, the owner, was lovely and a very friendly welcome to the park. The glamping tent was very clean, had all the amenities you need and very cozy! Thanks Matt, we will be back :)

We had an amazing stay in one of the Safari glamping tents, wish we stayed for more than just one night. The tent is super cozy and filled with anything you'd need, from cooking utensils to towels, even shampoo, conditioner etc. Better than most hotels tbh. The host was incredibly welcoming and helpful, highly recommend!
We stayed for 3 nights in our caravan. I highly recommend a stay here. The amenities were fantastic, a great camp kitchen and well maintained park as well as friendly service.

Impeccable friendly customer service!
Called to request just a shower and they were very helpful.
$5 hot showers, with modern clean facilities.

I appreciate Scamander Sanctuary for providing a service which allows people to maintain their dignity and hygiene.
10/10 recommend 👌
Great experience staying in the bell glamping tent.

Wake up 2minutes walk from this? What more can I say?

Wrens and Bandicoots hopping around you as you relax with a cold drink by the pot belly fireplaces. Wood can be bought from the reception for $15 for a big bag.

Ok so how does it all unfold? On the way we recieve texts giving us information about check in and the boom gate. I arrived a bit late, but the owner of the park was close by and personally greets us and says to me , "are you Bradley?". Impressive that he remembers the names of his bookings and who hasn't arrived yet. And he is so friendly.

Book in was easy. A breeze. Then we drive to our Glamping tent. It's beautifully nestled up against the native trees and brush. The tents are kind of close to each other but far enough to be comfortable. We stayed in the two room glamping tent.

It has a pot-belly wood burner, a small deck with BBQ and dining table. Walking inside there is a double bed. The bed is quite firm. But its also glamping so deal with it. There is an espressotoria coffee machine (note nespresso pods don't fit this, a sink microwave toaster and kettle. A small TV (which you shouldn't by using!). Next room is 4 beds (2 bunks). Final room is a bathroom with shower sink and toilet. The shower head is quite low and suits shorter people better, but again you're glamping thr shower should be quick!

The room was tidy and smelled extremely clean. The bedsheets and mattresses were all clean. Everything looked well maintained. My only gripe Waa that you could tell the cups and plates hadn't been used in a while, but you're washing them before using them anyway unless you're insane.

The key to this experience is the area it unlocks for you. The native coastline. The beach. The wildlife. The birds. There was a pair of wrens around our site. A male and female. 🐦

Come and stay. Slow down. Connect with nature. The accommodation is a vehicle to facilitate your connection to this beautiful place. Enjoy waking up to the sounds of birds and distant waves.

It was lovely being met by Matt's smiling face and kind and caring manner, a real asset to the holiday park. The campsites are large and flat, the ammenities are very modern and clean. It's in a great location with a lovely walk down to the beach. I would highly recommend this campground. Keep up the fabulous work. Thanks Matt for the help getting me a fire barrel.

Second time we have stayed at this park and same as before it's such a great place! Credit to the new owner Matt who was buzzing around doing everything on his own! Still magnificently maintained. Keep up the great work Matt 😊
Stayed o'nite in our van, easy checkin, great ensuite amenities and friendly staff. Would recommend

Lovely stay!
I stayed here alone for 2 nights.
I changed my booking before I got there from 1 to 2 nights and the owner happily applied the mid week 2 night special for me.
He was friendly and his 2 dogs are super cute!
I saw some cool birds and some bandicoots when sitting on my little deck.
I stayed in the glamping tent and wow, it has everything!
I loved the heated blankets and the heat pump, a microwave kettle and sink etc was great so I didn't have to leave my tent for essentials. But use of the full kitchen was great for cooking meals.
A short walk to the isolated beach was awesome, thru trees and critters running around.
I felt safe and relaxed here!
Highly recommend to anyone staying on the east coast of Tasmania.
Easy access in and out with gate code and simple check out.

Thanks so much :)

Safari tent with the kids was such a great experience, everything you need but in a tent, in a serene location surrounded by wildlife  and a fantastic beach within minutes walk. Great location and price.
Nothing was a problem for the friendly staff, will definitely be back.
really wonderful experience

Beautifully presented holiday park! Unique and luxurious tents, set up very well and accomodating for every need. Very friendly and inviting staff. 10/10 holiday park, this really put the cherry on the top for our trip to Tasmania!
Best family friendly place to stay . We had a quality time. We will definitely back next time

Awesome park!!!
Matt was great to deal with, friendly and very accomadating. The cleanliness of the whole place was spot on. We were in a caravan but my wife checked out the glamming tents and loved them.
The walk to the beach is cleared and kid friendly 😊
This caravan park has a good vibe to it.  We will be back for sure.   5/5
A great caravan park! We loved our stay here, lovely clean park and amenities. Owner is really friendly and went out of his way to help us out with a fire pit etc. Would definitely be back.
